title: Repo Health Rules
description: Unified per-repo enforcement config consumed by the make-no-mistakes repo-health hooks (PreToolUse: structural blocking; PostToolUse: drift telemetry). Drop this file at consumer repo root as `.repo-health-rules.json`. SUPERSET of `schemas/atomic-design-rules.schema.json`: that file's junk-drawer / exception-marker concepts generalize here to per-family `pattern`+`exemptionMarker` rules keyed by the six audit-engine namespaces (SCH|CDC|DDD|ARC|STR|ENF). The atomic-design component layer (E### findings) stays owned by `atomic-design-toolkit` and is NOT a family here (composition, not fusion). IN THIS SLICE the schema + the `proposeHookRule` emitter that targets it are delivered; the live PreToolUse/PostToolUse `.sh` hooks that READ this file and the 4-cure apply step are Phase-2-later.

version.description: Schema version. Current schema is version 1.

enforcementLevel.description: advisory = hooks warn only (PostToolUse telemetry); strict = PreToolUse blocks on blocker/high rules. Mirrors the governance.md advisory→blocking promotion model.

families.description: Rules keyed by the six audit-engine finding-ID namespaces. Each value is an array of structural enforcement rules for that family. Keys are optional — an absent or empty family means no enforcement for it.

rule.description: One structural enforcement rule. Generalizes the atomic-design junk-drawer/canonical-folder/forbid-pattern concepts: `pattern` is the glob/ERE the hook matches a write against; `message` is shown on a block; `exemptionMarker` is the in-file comment (analog of atomic-design `exempt_markers`, default family of `@repo-health-exempt`) that lets a legitimate write through.

id.description: Stable rule id, kebab-case, scoped by family (e.g. 'sch-bio-duplicated-across-3-tables-without-ssot'). Produced by the cure-scaffold emitter.

pattern.description: Glob (e.g. '**/*.sql') or ERE the PreToolUse/PostToolUse hook matches the written path/content against.

message.description: Human-readable violation message surfaced on a block. Typically the originating finding title.

severity.description: Aligned with the audit-report contract + governance.md. Under enforcementLevel=strict, blocker/high block; lower severities warn.

exemptionMarker.description: In-file comment marker that exempts a write from this rule (e.g. '@repo-health-exempt'). The hook scans for '// <marker>: <reason>' or '# <marker>: <reason>' in the content payload.
